brand.name: All Point Consultants
brand.vertical: B2B/Professional services — financial wellness & business formation consulting

offer.what: One-on-one financial consulting and business formation guidance delivered through structured service tracks (Clarity Track, Guided Track, Business Readiness Track) plus business credit building and financing matchmaking via a sub-brand (go.allpointconsultants.com). Supported by a secure client portal, learning platform, and vetted professional network.
offer.coreOutcome: Clients move from financial confusion and reactive decision-making to a clear, structured plan — understanding how their personal credit, business credit, and financial systems interconnect so they can act with confidence.
offer.pricePoint: Unknown — no public pricing. Likely mid-to-high ticket consulting retainer or project-based engagement. Business financing/credit programs may include referral/commission model.
offer.commitment: Multi-phase engagement: Discovery → Plan → Implementation → Review. Ongoing 'Guided Track' implies recurring relationship; 'Clarity Track' appears to be a one-time assessment/report.
leadMagnets: Free PDF: '27 Killer Ways to Get Cash — What Banks Won't Tell You'
Free PDF: 'The Ultimate Business Credit & Financing Guide'
Free client portal access with guided intake process

audience.icp: Individuals and small business owners in the US who feel overwhelmed by overlapping personal/business finances, damaged or thin credit, and unclear paths to funding. Often reacting to a financial event (denied loan, business launch, credit problem) rather than proactively planning.
painPoints: Receiving financial advice without understanding the underlying systems
Personal and business finances dangerously intertwined
Credit challenges blocking access to business funding
Not knowing where to start with business formation or funding readiness
Past bad experiences with quick-fix credit repair or predatory lenders
segments: Individuals: personal credit repair/rebuild, budgeting clarity, general financial wellness
Business owners: entity structuring, business credit establishment, funding readiness
Personal-business crossover: entrepreneurs whose personal credit is tied to business liabilities

salesCycle.length: Weeks — typically a few touchpoints from lead magnet download or assessment to paid engagement
salesCycle.trial: Yes — free 15-minute assessment consultation (TidyCal booking). Also free downloadable PDFs as top-of-funnel entry.
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Discovery call → structured proposal or track recommendation → client portal onboarding. Low-pressure, education-first positioning; no auto-enrollment.
salesCycle.topObjection: Skepticism about real results vs. promises ('Is this just another credit repair scam?'), cost uncertainty (no public pricing), and belief they can figure it out alone.

ahaMoment: The first consultation where the client sees their full financial picture mapped clearly — credit, business structure, and funding readiness — and walks away with a written plan and specific next steps rather than vague advice.

retention.recurring: Ongoing 'Guided Track' consulting sessions and client portal access. Business financing programs may generate repeat engagement as client scales.
retention.expansion: Upsell from Clarity Track (assessment only) to Guided Track (ongoing support); cross-sell from personal financial wellness to business formation and business credit tracks; professional network referrals.
retention.churnRisk: Long cycles with unclear milestones leading to disengagement; clients who don't take action between sessions; price sensitivity if value isn't made tangible early.

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — likely minimal; new clients need a structured sequence that anchors the first-value moment (the consultation) and sets expectations for the 4-phase process
Lead-Magnet Nurture — free PDF downloads likely receive no automated follow-up; prime opportunity to move leads from curious to booked-assessment
Trial/Consult Conversion — no-show prevention and follow-up sequence after free assessment to convert to paid track
Booking & Reminders — assessment scheduling confirmation, reminders, and pre-meeting prep email to increase show rates
Value Newsletter — ongoing financial education content to maintain trust and authority with dormant/nurture list
Renewal / Anniversary & Expansion — re-engage past clients, trigger expansion conversations at natural milestones
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — large segment of leads who downloaded PDFs or booked then went cold
toneVoice: Calm, authoritative, and educational — never salesy or fear-based. Speaks plainly about complex financial topics. Emphasizes understanding over urgency. Think 'trusted advisor in your corner' rather than 'consultant pitching services.' Slight warmth; founder-led voice (Glenn Grahl). Avoids jargon; prefers clear analogies.
compliance: Financial consulting (not registered investment advice). Must include standard financial disclaimer language. CAN-SPAM compliant. No HIPAA. Should avoid specific yield/return promises or claims that could be construed as regulated financial advice. Florida-based LLC — state-level disclosure considerations.
